steps.t: You should investigate the strange pile on one of the rafts in Esgaroth-of-old.
Smaug's bones are in the water, in Esgaroth-of-old. You should find a good vantage place to inspect Smaug's bones.
You should talk to Thorlind, who can be found just outside of Esgaroth-of-old.
You should travel to Lake-town, north of Esgaroth-of-old.
Lake-town can be found in the Dale-lands. You should look for anyone in Lake-town who is concerned with Smaug's bones.
The unruly crowd can be found in Lake-town. You should find out why someone in the unruly crowd spoke the name of Smaug.
